2022-T1-P1-S9.trunk: 引语(主句+because) + 倒装提示语：「Certain artifacts are especially vulnerable because …」 says Thea van Oosten …
structure: 引语：Certain artifacts are especially vulnerable because some pioneers in plastic art didn't always know how to mix ingredients properly
└ 原因状语从句(because)：because some pioneers … didn't always know how to mix ingredients properly（how + 不定式作 know 的宾语）
倒装提示语：says Thea van Oosten, a polymer chemist who …（= Thea van Oosten says）
└ 同位语〔说明 Thea van Oosten〕：a polymer chemist
└ 定语从句〔who，修饰 a polymer chemist〕：who, until retiring a few years ago, worked for decades at the Cultural Heritage Agency of the Netherlands
2022-T1-P1-S9.logic: 引语 artifacts are vulnerable because…（how to mix… 宾语）；says + 主语 倒装；a polymer chemist 同位语，who 定语从句修饰（until retiring… 插入时间状语）。
notes: says Thea van Oosten…：引语提示语的倒装（= … says）；a polymer chemist 是其同位语。
know how to mix ingredients properly：how + 不定式作 know 的宾语。
who, until retiring a few years ago, worked…：who 定语从句修饰 a polymer chemist，until retiring… 是插入的时间状语。

2022-T1-P1-S23.trunk: S+V+O：Joana Lia Ferreira … notes that …（费雷拉指出…）
structure: 主句：Joana Lia Ferreira … notes that …
├ 同位语〔说明 Ferreira〕：an assistant professor of conservation and restoration at the NOVA School of Science and Technology
└ 宾语从句(that)：archaeologists first defined the great material ages of human history … after examining artifacts in museums
├ 破折号同位列举〔说明 the great material ages〕：Stone Age, Iron Age, and so on
└ 时间状语(after + V-ing)：after examining artifacts in museums
2022-T1-P1-S23.logic: 主语 Ferreira（同位语很长，造成主谓分隔），谓语 notes that…；宾语从句 defined the great material ages（破折号列举 Stone Age… 同位）；after examining… 时间状语。
notes: 主谓分隔：主语 Joana Lia Ferreira 与谓语 notes 被长同位语隔开。
破折号夹的 Stone Age, Iron Age, and so on 是 the great material ages 的同位列举。
after examining artifacts in museums：after + 动名词作时间状语（在考察…之后）。

2022-T1-P1-S24.trunk: S+V：We now live in an age of plastic（我们如今生活在塑料时代）
structure: 主句：We now live in an age of plastic
引语：what we decide to collect today, what we decide to preserve … will have a strong impact on how in the future we'll be seen
├ 并列主语从句(what)：what we decide to collect today / what we decide to preserve
├ 谓语：will have a strong impact on …
└ 介词宾语从句(how)：how in the future we'll be seen
2022-T1-P1-S24.logic: 主句 We live in an age of plastic（she says 插入）；引语主语是两个并列 what 从句，谓语 will have impact on…；how… 宾语从句。
notes: what we decide to collect…, what we decide to preserve…：两个并列 what 主语从句作引语主语。
a strong impact on how … we'll be seen：how 引导介词 on 的宾语从句（对将来我们如何被看待…）。
